mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM sys_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE user_type = #{userType} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE status = #{status} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE (username = #{account} OR phone = #{account}) AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_deleted = 0

SELECT DISTINCT p.perm_code FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE user_type = #{userType} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE DATE(create_time) = #{createDate} AND is_deleted = 0
